metaTitle: Trading With Matt | Precision, Access, Edge
metaDescription: A premium trading membership for serious traders who want structure, sharper execution, and closer access to Matt's market process.
heroTitle: Precision for traders who are done wasting potential.
heroSubtitle: Join a premium trading environment built around discipline, high-quality market reads, and direct access to the process behind better decisions. Less noise. Better positioning. Stronger conviction.

heroProofCards.title: Authority
heroProofCards.body: 15+ years of market experience distilled into cleaner decisions and stronger discipline.

heroProofCards.title: Exclusivity
heroProofCards.body: Private access, direct feedback, and a higher-standard room built for serious traders.

heroProofCards.title: Opportunity
heroProofCards.body: Join for structure, stay for sharper reads, better filters, and more conviction around execution.

heroFloatingBody: People join premium offers when the brand projects calm authority, scarce access, and a believable path to better outcomes.
storyTitle: You do not need more trades. You need a better filter.
storyBody: Most traders do not fail because they lack effort. They fail because they operate in noise, react emotionally, and never develop a refined framework for what deserves action. Matt's offer is designed to tighten decision-making, raise standards, and help traders operate with more patience, more structure, and more edge.
offersTitle: Choose the level of access that matches your standard
offersIntro: From serious community access to close mentorship, each membership is structured to move a trader from scattered effort toward composed execution.

offers.name: Core
offers.summary: The right starting point for traders who want disciplined market access, live context, and a serious room.

offers.name: Precision
offers.summary: For traders who want more proximity, sharper feedback, and direct refinement from Matt.

offers.name: Apex
offers.summary: A private, high-touch environment for traders who want serious coaching and elevated access.

processSteps.title: Clarity
processSteps.body: A sharper understanding of what matters now, what to ignore, and which setups are worth your capital.

processSteps.title: Discipline
processSteps.body: A tighter decision framework for entries, patience, risk, and execution under pressure.

processSteps.title: Access
processSteps.body: Signals, live market discussion, direct feedback, and a community with higher standards.

faqTitle: Questions serious traders ask before joining

faqs.question: How do I get access to Matt's signals?
faqs.answer: All paid plans include VIP Discord access where signals, market discussion, and trade commentary are shared.

faqs.question: Which plan includes one-to-one mentorship?
faqs.answer: Precision includes one monthly call and Apex expands that into a more hands-on coaching relationship.

faqs.question: Can I cancel if it is not the right fit?
faqs.answer: Yes. The memberships are structured as recurring access and can be canceled.

finalCtaTitle: Step into a trading environment built for people who want more than motivation.
finalCtaBody: If you are ready for clearer structure, better execution, and closer access to Matt's market thinking, this is where that next level begins.
